title: Breakthrough in Battery Tech: A Safer Future with Lithium-Ion Batteries
summary: Researchers have uncovered the mechanical properties of nanoscale 'thorns' that develop inside lithium-ion batteries. These thorns, known as dendrites, can cause batteries to short circuit and overheat, leading to spontaneous combustion. Understanding these structures opens the door to safer and more sustainable battery technology. This breakthrough is a significant step forward in developing better storage solutions for renewable energy and can lead to a greener future for us all.
image_alt: Researchers unravel the physics behind dangerous battery thorns, leading to safer lithium-ion batteries.

title: Belgium on the Bike: The Rise of the Speed Pedelec
summary: In Belgium, there is a remarkable rise of the speed pedelec, a fast electric bike that is becoming increasingly popular. The bicycle market in Belgium seems to be recovering from the coronavirus crisis, with a 7.1 percent increase in the sale of new bicycles in 2025. This results in 578,737 bicycles sold. Speed pedelecs and longtails are particularly in demand. This trend shows a growing interest in sustainable and efficient means of transport, which is a positive sign for the future of the bicycle industry and mobility in Belgium.

title: The Future of Gaming: AI as a Playmate
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is playing an increasingly larger role in the gaming world. While some gamers are wary of AI Slop, there are also serious ways in which AI is being implemented that can enhance the gaming experience. For example, AI can be used to adjust the difficulty level of a game to the player's skills, making the game challenging and fun for everyone. Additionally, AI can be used to make the world of a game more alive by, for instance, having non-player characters (NPCs) react to the player's actions. This can lead to a more immersive and realistic gaming experience. AI can also be used to speed up game development by, for example, automatically generating levels or helping to test games. While there are still many challenges in the implementation of AI in games, it is clear that AI can have a big impact on the future of gaming.

title: A Life of Resilience and Love
summary: Sue Miller, 83, has led a life full of challenges and triumphs. She has raised her children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren, often alone. Despite cancer and other obstacles, she remains active and works part-time as a lunch lady. Her story is a testament to resilience, love, and the ability to survive. She hopes to keep working until she's 90 and to live until she's 100, for the sake of her grandson. Her life is an inspiration to anyone struggling with challenges and looking for ways to keep going.
